reference_inputs.display_name: 全剧低魔东方史诗风格板

production_metadata.reference_input_policy: Reference inputs are production metadata for the generator operator. Upload or link them as images/control layers when available, but do not copy ids, paths, source refs, and usage notes into model_visible_prompt.
production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must move to sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes.

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建第二集火场逃亡整体风格与材质板，一张本集风格与规则参考板
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 低魔东方史诗、制度洁净压迫、火光烟灰、草药青、虫蜡白、月白和金赤旧驿残光分区展示
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9风格参考板，最低分辨率2048；用清晰分区展示材质色彩样本、光照示例、横屏宽屏构图样片、低魔边界、精确符号边界和禁用方向对照；不要做成宣传海报或单个剧情镜头
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：随附全剧风格母板用于统一低魔东方史诗、制度洁净感、生活门槛被越过的压迫、火场真实因果、旧驿金赤残光和精确符号控制；后续角色、场景、道具和参考画面必须继承这套规则。若画面出现白册、日月纹、血牒、半枚驿令、虫蜡封条、旁注、徽记或文字类痕迹，必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要高魔法光效、宫廷甜宠质感、喜剧化、爽剧海报、现代界面或随机符号。

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建第二集火场逃亡整体风格与材质板，一张本集风格与规则参考板。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

低魔东方史诗、制度洁净压迫、火光烟灰、草药青、虫蜡白、月白和金赤旧驿残光分区展示。

16:9风格参考板，最低分辨率2048；用清晰分区展示材质色彩样本、光照示例、横屏宽屏构图样片、低魔边界、精确符号边界和禁用方向对照；不要做成宣传海报或单个剧情镜头。

硬锁：随附全剧风格母板用于统一低魔东方史诗、制度洁净感、生活门槛被越过的压迫、火场真实因果、旧驿金赤残光和精确符号控制；后续角色、场景、道具和参考画面必须继承这套规则。若画面出现白册、日月纹、血牒、半枚驿令、虫蜡封条、旁注、徽记或文字类痕迹，必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

required_views: material swatches
lighting examples
landscape widescreen composition examples
do-and-do-not comparison
symbol or low-magic boundary examples

composition_layers.board_background: clean style-board layout rather than final scene
composition_layers.material_palette: materials, colors, texture, and light examples grouped by rule
composition_layers.application_examples: small example frames showing how the style applies to characters, props, locations, or low-magic marks
composition_layers.rejection_examples: visual notes for prohibited styles, modern marks, wrong symbols, or over-magical effects

qc_checks: style board is reusable across assets
material and color rules are readable
low-magic and precision-symbol limits are explicit
no final video frame framing requirement is implied
no watermarks or random text

required_views: front full body
side view
back view
three-quarter view
face/head detail crop
hands/action detail crop
wardrobe material crop
scale reference

composition_layers.card_background: neutral matte plain background only, no scene or final video-frame environment
composition_layers.primary_views: front, side, back, and three-quarter full-body views arranged as a readable character board
composition_layers.detail_crops: face, hands, old wounds, wardrobe texture, accessories, and action posture details
composition_layers.scale_reference: doorframe, table, hand, child/adult body, weapon, or prop reference sized to body_metrics

qc_checks: not treated as a final video frame
neutral background, no alpha transparency in this card
required views and detail crops are present
body metrics and source identity reference remain stable
no modern clothing, random text, or wrong faction anatomy

required_views: front view
side view
top or open view when useful
hand-scale or tabletop-scale view
material/damage/marking detail crop
precision line-control crop when symbols or text-like marks appear

composition_layers.card_background: neutral matte plain background only, no scene or final video-frame environment
composition_layers.primary_views: front, side, and use-state views arranged as a readable prop board
composition_layers.detail_crops: material texture, wear, seals, marks, mechanisms, damage, line-control areas, exact symbol panels, fabric, trim, closures, dirt, or rank marks
composition_layers.scale_reference: human hand, tabletop, doorway, child/adult body, or carrying reference sized to physical_dimensions

qc_checks: not treated as a final video frame
neutral background, no alpha transparency in this card
required views and detail crops are present
scale reference matches physical_dimensions
precise symbols, records, seals, or text-like marks use line-control or post-composite planning and are not randomly invented

model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 缚网押车与铜环声，连接沈照眠失踪、外署换名和追捕线。尺度锁定：一辆押车长度约成人两到三步；车身窄到能过村口路；车栏高过儿童肩；沈照眠、奴兵手和车轮；旧木、铁环和湿绳沉重；木板厚实，铜环磨损

required_views: front view
side view
top or open view when useful
hand-scale or tabletop-scale view
material/damage/marking detail crop
precision line-control crop when symbols or text-like marks appear

composition_layers.card_background: neutral matte plain background only, no scene or final video-frame environment
composition_layers.primary_views: front, side, and use-state views arranged as a readable prop board
composition_layers.detail_crops: material texture, wear, seals, marks, mechanisms, damage, line-control areas, exact symbol panels, fabric, trim, closures, dirt, or rank marks
composition_layers.scale_reference: human hand, tabletop, doorway, child/adult body, or carrying reference sized to physical_dimensions

qc_checks: not treated as a final video frame
neutral background, no alpha transparency in this card
required views and detail crops are present
scale reference matches physical_dimensions
precise symbols, records, seals, or text-like marks use line-control or post-composite planning and are not randomly invented

创建清明香灰白追踪气味道具卡，一张道具本集状态参考板。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

灰白清明香追踪气味，贴血、旧蜡或血牒反应。尺度锁定：针或香约一掌到前臂长度；细长可握；细杆状；白翳手指、白册和桌面裂缝；轻但冷硬；虫蜡外壳细密。

16:9中性纯背景道具板，最低分辨率2048；包含正视、侧视、俯视或打开视图、手持或桌面尺度、材质厚度、磨损损伤、声音线索和结构细节裁切；涉及白册、日月纹、血牒、半枚驿令、虫蜡封条、徽记或文字痕迹时，精确区域留白并使用线控、遮罩或后合成。

硬锁：随附全剧道具母卡和本集风格参考图用于锁定轮廓、尺度、材质、磨损、归属关系和符号边界；精确文字与徽记不得让模型随机生成。若画面出现白册、日月纹、血牒、半枚驿令、虫蜡封条、旁注、徽记或文字类痕迹，必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

required_views: front view
side view
top or open view when useful
hand-scale or tabletop-scale view
material/damage/marking detail crop
precision line-control crop when symbols or text-like marks appear

composition_layers.card_background: neutral matte plain background only, no scene or final video-frame environment
composition_layers.primary_views: front, side, and use-state views arranged as a readable prop board
composition_layers.detail_crops: material texture, wear, seals, marks, mechanisms, damage, line-control areas, exact symbol panels, fabric, trim, closures, dirt, or rank marks
composition_layers.scale_reference: human hand, tabletop, doorway, child/adult body, or carrying reference sized to physical_dimensions

qc_checks: not treated as a final video frame
neutral background, no alpha transparency in this card
required views and detail crops are present
scale reference matches physical_dimensions
precise symbols, records, seals, or text-like marks use line-control or post-composite planning and are not randomly invented

灰褐猎衣、草药青内层、旧皮护腕、猎弓带、短刀带和路线包被火场烟灰压暗，左肩旧伤导致衣料受力和动作限制持续可见。服装必须显示层次、颜色、布料织纹、火烟磨损、封蜡或等级痕迹，并保持角色身份和本集动作限制。

16:9中性纯背景服装板，最低分辨率2048；包含正面、侧面、背面、三分之二穿着视图，另有布料织纹、系结、磨损、封蜡或等级痕迹细节裁切和人体尺度参照；这是可复用服装资产板，不做成剧情镜头或透明抠图。

硬锁：随附全剧服装母板、角色母卡和本集风格参考图用于锁定服装层次、颜色、布料、磨损、角色身份与穿着尺度；徽记、文字和符号只允许通过线控、遮罩或后合成精确控制。若画面出现白册、日月纹、血牒、半枚驿令、虫蜡封条、旁注、徽记或文字类痕迹，必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

避免：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要现代裁剪、舞台戏服、英雄华服、军官甲误用、破布条堆砌或随机等级徽记。

required_views: front full outfit
side outfit view
back outfit view
three-quarter outfit view
fabric/material crop
fastener/marking/damage crop
body-scale reference

composition_layers.card_background: neutral matte plain background only, no scene or final video-frame environment
composition_layers.primary_views: front, side, back, and three-quarter outfit views arranged as a costume board
composition_layers.detail_crops: material texture, wear, seals, marks, mechanisms, damage, line-control areas, exact symbol panels, fabric, trim, closures, dirt, or rank marks
composition_layers.scale_reference: human hand, tabletop, doorway, child/adult body, or carrying reference sized to physical_dimensions

qc_checks: not treated as a final video frame
neutral background, no alpha transparency in this card
required views and detail crops are present
scale reference matches physical_dimensions
precise symbols, records, seals, or text-like marks use line-control or post-composite planning and are not randomly invented

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：追捕压力或对手反制。动作状态：对手或环境升级，迫使人物改变路线：罗青禾从药柜旁扑来，一把药粉撒进奴兵眼里。场景：罗青禾药屋地窖。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代罗青禾药屋地窖的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：低角全景，门缝与遮挡后窥视，由道具拉焦到人物；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

避免：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：角色代价与价值选择。动作状态：停留在角色代价，不用旁白解释；动作锚点来自本场事实：罗青禾从药柜旁扑来，一把药粉撒进奴兵眼里。场景：罗青禾药屋地窖。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代罗青禾药屋地窖的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：插入特写，长焦压缩追捕距离，轻微下压；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。
copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

创建追捕压力或对手反制的横屏电影参考画面。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：追捕压力或对手反制。动作状态：对手或环境升级，迫使人物改变路线：他看到沈照眠被推向木车，眼神变了。场景：残阳坳村口。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代残阳坳村口的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：低角全景，门缝与遮挡后窥视，由道具拉焦到人物；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代药屋火场的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：特写，侧前方保持人物与道具同框，横移扫证据；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

避免：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：押车路口与沈维桑。动作状态：押车路口按剧本时间建立，沈维桑和晏南枝贴着柴垛潜行。场景：押车路口。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代押车路口的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：横屏远景，平视贴近人物，慢推；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

避免：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
请生成一张图像。生成时请同时上传或引用本资产记录列出的已批准参考图、控制图或线控层；参考图负责锁定身份、服装、道具、场景和风格，不要把资产编号、文件路径或生产备注写入画面。

正向要求：
创建追捕压力或对手反制的横屏电影参考画面。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：追捕压力或对手反制。动作状态：对手或环境升级，迫使人物改变路线：罗青禾看向押车远去，眼里疼到发空。场景：押车路口。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代押车路口的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：低角全景，门缝与遮挡后窥视，由道具拉焦到人物；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

反向要求：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated

camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。
copy_ready.gemini_image_prompt:
生成图像。生成时请同时上传或引用本资产记录列出的已批准参考图、控制图或线控层；参考图负责锁定身份、服装、道具、场景和风格，不要把资产编号、文件路径或生产备注写入画面。

画面要求：
创建罗青禾的反应与对话压力的横屏电影参考画面。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、火光、烟灰、旧木、草药、虫蜡、月白玉、纸册、旧金属和土褐布料都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：罗青禾的反应与对话压力。动作状态：罗青禾说出或承受台词“你不是替她守旧旗，是替残阳坳守一条活路。先拿到路，再去把照眠从白册上换回来。”，动作保持克制，画面重点落在手、眼神和站位变化。场景：后山坡。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代后山坡的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：特写，侧前方保持人物与道具同框，横移扫证据；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

避免：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated

camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

画面主体：押车。动作状态：镜头压到押车，让其承载本场信息：晏南枝脸色微变。场景：后山坡。

16:9横屏电影参考画面，最低分辨率1080；前景保留道具、手部、门槛、痕迹或证据，中景承接人物动作、接触反作用和阻挡关系，背景交代后山坡的入口、出口、火烟、追捕压力或逃亡方向；机位：过肩中景，反打压住表情代价，后退跟拍；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

避免：
不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立设定板背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、无因果大火或无真实接触反作用的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, fire/smoke, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: project delivery canvas, minimum 1080x1920
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
